title: Release v1.15.0: bump, regen, full verify green, commit, tag, push, CI dispatch
read_first: memory flow: bump_version 1.15.0 -> render_plugin -> manifest --write -> onboard --apply (recheck up_to_date) -> full verify FOREGROUND -> commit -> tag v1.15.0 -> push origin main --tags -> gh workflow run CI
action: Run by the ORCHESTRATOR in-session (release machinery, main checkout): node scripts/bump_version.mjs 1.15.0; node scripts/render_plugin_skill_trees.mjs; node scripts/release_manifest.mjs --write; node skills/bee-hive/scripts/onboard_bee.mjs --repo-root . --apply --repo-hooks --json (expect recheck up_to_date); BEE_VERIFY_CONCURRENCY=12 node scripts/run_verify.mjs FOREGROUND reading every FAIL line (0 required); two spaced tree snapshots to confirm no sibling is writing; git add explicit paths (never -A with settings files); commit 'release: bee 1.15.0 — work-visibility, cli-ergonomics, scribing-integrity, PR #60/#61'; annotated tag v1.15.0; git push origin main --tags; gh workflow run CI --ref main. MINOR bump: new CLI surfaces (self-timing, --dry-run, batch refusals, scribing ledger/orphan sweep).

truths: full verify 96 suites green foreground before commit
tuple consistent across all 4 members (bump_version single registry)
tag v1.15.0 on the release commit; pushed with --tags
CI dispatched on the exact tag commit

trace.outcome: v1.15.0 released: bump, regen, 96/96 verify, commit+tag+push, CI dispatched
